claim: Japan is in a moderate inflation and growth regime, with the BOJ gradually normalizing policy after years of ultra-loose stance.

provenance.definition: Japan is in a moderate inflation and growth regime, with the BOJ gradually normalizing policy after years of ultra-loose stance.
provenance.level_fallback_reason: all levels sparse (total 3 usable case(s)); rate is wide by construction

cases.description: BOJ raised rate from 0.0-0.1% to 0.25% in July 2024, first hike in 17 years, amid rising inflation and wage growth.
cases.basis_quote: The Bank decided to raise the guideline for the uncollateralized overnight call rate to around 0.25%.

cases.description: BOJ raised rate from 0.25% to 0.5% in January 2025, citing sustained inflation above target and positive wage cycle.
cases.basis_quote: The Bank decided to raise the guideline for the uncollateralized overnight call rate to around 0.5%.

cases.description: BOJ raised rate from 0.5% to 0.75% in March 2025, continuing normalization.
cases.basis_quote: The Bank decided to raise the guideline for the uncollateralized overnight call rate to around 0.75%.

claim: Market and internal pressure for a June hike is high, with dissenting members advocating for 1.0%.

provenance.definition: Market and internal pressure for a June hike is high, with dissenting members advocating for 1.0%.
provenance.level_fallback_reason: all levels sparse (total 1 usable case(s)); rate is wide by construction

cases.description: At April 2026 meeting, three members proposed raising rate to 1.0%, but were defeated 6-3.
cases.basis_quote: Three dissenting members — Nakagawa Junko, Takata Hajime, and Tamura Naoki — proposed raising the rate to 1.0%, but their proposals were defeated.

claim: Governor Ueda has signaled gradual normalization but has not committed to a June hike, emphasizing data dependence.

provenance.definition: Governor Ueda has signaled gradual normalization but has not committed to a June hike, emphasizing data dependence.
provenance.level_fallback_reason: all levels sparse (total 1 usable case(s)); rate is wide by construction

cases.description: Ueda's press conference after April 2026 meeting emphasized need for more data on wages and consumption.
cases.basis_quote: Governor Ueda stated that the Bank needs to scrutinize more data on wage developments and consumption before adjusting policy.
